chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. 1st Appeal No. 209 of 2002 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 01.12.2025. M/s Muhammad Sulleman Unar and Asad Ali Jatoi, Advocates for appellant. Mr. Abdul Ghafoor Hakro, Advocate for respondent. = For reasons to follow, the appeal is allowed in terms of the prayer clause (i) and the impugned judgment dated 28.10.2002 and decree dated 14.11.2002 are set aside and the office is directed to prepare appellate judgment and decree in terms of the short order passed today. JUDGE Tufail
